construction.panels: Standard body panels with set-in sleeves. The hood is attached and appears to be constructed from multiple panels (e.g., a central panel and side panels) to give it shape.
construction.seams: Standard flat seams with tonal stitching, not visibly contrasting.
construction.closures: Full-front snap button closure with black, possibly plastic or metal, snap buttons.
construction.details: Rib-knit cuffs and hem in black. Attached hood made from a contrasting fabric. Side entry pockets are implied by the jacket style but not clearly visible in the image.

graphics.content: A stylized black rose graphic, rendered in white and light grey tones, featuring intricate details of petals and possibly thorns, with a somewhat gothic or dark aesthetic.
graphics.style: flat embroidery with visible texture from the stitching

branding.primary_logo: The stylized black rose graphic, rendered in white/grey embroidery.
branding.secondary_marks: A small, indistinct purple and orange tag is visible inside the neck, likely a brand or size label.

fabric_appearance: The body and sleeves are made of a smooth, lustrous satin fabric, exhibiting a soft sheen and fluid drape. The hood appears to be made from a matte, possibly cotton-blend fleece or jersey fabric, providing a textural contrast to the satin body.
unique_features: The distinctive combination of a shiny satin bomber jacket body with an attached hood made from a contrasting matte fabric. The full-front snap button closure adds to the classic bomber aesthetic.
collection_aesthetic: The black color palette, luxurious satin finish, and the stylized rose graphic align with a 'dark luxury' aesthetic. The bomber silhouette and streetwear elements contribute to the 'Oakland grit' and 'emotional expression' aspects of the SkyyRose brand.
